channel.title: Usage on stashed
channel.description: Recent content in Usage on stashed

item.title: jrnl: The Smarter, Faster Way to Take Notes on the Go
item.description: Take notes on the go without distractions, faster and easier than ever. If you’re someone who wants to store your notes without opening an application, this versatile and feature-rich solution is perfect for you as you work.

item.title: `nmcli`
item.description:
What is nmcli?

The nmcli means NetworkManager Command Line Interface. It’s command-line utility tool used for controlling NetworkManager and reporting network status.

In simple terms, we use that to interact with network related devices.

How to use it?

I don’t have proper way to explain, but let’s learn it with a case-scenario:

Connect to a wifi network:

  1. Turn on the wifi module:
sudo nmcli radio wifi on
  1. List the available networks:
sudo nmcli device wifi list

In case, it didn’t display any network, please rescan the available network and list it:
